tasks.label: pdfcut: run on test pages
tasks.command: ENVF=''; [ -f .env ] && ENVF='--env-file .env'; podman run --rm --userns=keep-id -v "$PWD:/data:Z" $ENVF pdf-cut run --input '${input:inputPdf}' --pages '${input:pages}'

tasks.label: pdfcut: run single stage (dev mounts, force)
tasks.command: ENVF=''; [ -f .env ] && ENVF='--env-file .env'; podman run --rm --userns=keep-id -v "$PWD:/data:Z" -v "$PWD/src:/app/src:Z" -v "$PWD/scripts:/app/scripts:Z" $ENVF pdf-cut run --input '${input:inputPdf}' --stages '${input:stage}' --force

tasks.label: pdfcut: run from stage onward (dev mounts, force)
tasks.command: ENVF=''; [ -f .env ] && ENVF='--env-file .env'; podman run --rm --userns=keep-id -v "$PWD:/data:Z" -v "$PWD/src:/app/src:Z" -v "$PWD/scripts:/app/scripts:Z" $ENVF pdf-cut run --input '${input:inputPdf}' --from '${input:stage}' --force

tasks.label: pdfcut: full book run
tasks.command: ENVF=''; [ -f .env ] && ENVF='--env-file .env'; podman run --rm --userns=keep-id -v "$PWD:/data:Z" $ENVF pdf-cut run --input '${input:inputPdf}'

tasks.label: pdfcut: markdown conversion (book body → output/book.md)
tasks.command: ENVF=''; [ -f .env ] && ENVF='--env-file .env'; podman run --rm --userns=keep-id -v "$PWD:/data:Z" $ENVF pdf-cut markdown --body-pages '${input:bodyPages}'

tasks.label: pdfcut: open HTML report
tasks.command: if command -v wslview >/dev/null; then wslview work/report.html; elif command -v explorer.exe >/dev/null; then explorer.exe "$(wslpath -w work/report.html)"; else xdg-open work/report.html; fi

tasks.label: pdfcut: slice input PDF (page range → small PDF)
pdfcut: render print PDF (output/book.md → output/book-print.pdf)
tasks.command: podman run --rm --userns=keep-id -v "$PWD:/data:Z" pdf-cut render --set render.pageWidthMm=148 --set render.pageHeightMm=210

inputs.description: PDF scan pages to process (page 1 = cover)
Book pages to transcribe ("all" lets the model skip front matter)
